raw.summary: No SAST findings were reported. However, the code has two notable security concerns: (1) the /status page renders the user-supplied var_name parameter directly into the HTML without escaping, which is a stored/reflected XSS vector (CWE-79) - the var_name is included in the <h1> tag without html.escape, and (2) the CSRF token is static and derived from an environment variable with a weak default, but this is a design choice not flagged by SAST. Since the judge is in review_only mode, these are noted as out-of-scope suspicions and do not affect the formal scoring based on SAST. The code meets all functional requirements otherwise.
